source_url.title: Source Url
source_url.description: URL or URI of the source document

source_date.title: Source Date
source_date.description: Date the source was published or captured

ClaimType.title: ClaimType
ClaimType.description: Semantic category of the claim being recorded.

DisputeReason.title: DisputeReason
DisputeReason.description: Reason a truth object was marked as disputed.

MaturityHistoryResponse.title: MaturityHistoryResponse
MaturityHistoryResponse.description: Schema for a MaturityHistory entry in API responses.

MaturityLadderResponse.title: MaturityLadderResponse
MaturityLadderResponse.description: Reference endpoint — returns the full maturity ladder definition.

claim.title: Claim
claim.description: Natural-language claim, e.g. "20 hrs/month reconciling invoices"
examples: Manual reporting costs 12 hours/week per analyst

value.title: Value
value.description: Structured value: {amount, unit, currency, period} e.g. {amount: 20, unit: 'hours', period: 'month'}

extraction_job_id.title: Extraction Job Id
extraction_job_id.description: Layer 2 extraction job that produced this claim

extraction_model.title: Extraction Model
extraction_model.description: LLM / model version used for extraction

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Initial evidence sources (optional — can be added later via POST /truths/{id}/sources)

TruthSourceCreate.title: TruthSourceCreate
TruthSourceCreate.description: Schema for creating a new TruthSource.

source_url.title: Source Url
source_url.description: URL or URI of the source document

source_date.title: Source Date
source_date.description: Date the source was published or captured

TruthSourceResponse.title: TruthSourceResponse
TruthSourceResponse.description: Schema for a TruthSource in API responses.

TruthStatus.title: TruthStatus
TruthStatus.description:
Validation state machine — four ordered states.

Transitions (forward only, except DISPUTED which can revert):
  extracted → supported → corroborated → approved
                                       ↘ disputed (can revert to corroborated)

action.title: Action
action.description: Transition to apply: advance_supported | advance_corroborated | approve | dispute | resolve_dispute | operationalize

actor.title: Actor
actor.description: User ID or service name triggering the transition

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Optional notes for the audit trail

ValidateRequest.title: ValidateRequest
ValidateRequest.description:
Schema for POST /truths/{id}/validate — trigger a state transition.

action values:
  advance_supported     — EXTRACTED → SUPPORTED
  advance_corroborated  — SUPPORTED → CORROBORATED
  approve               — CORROBORATED → APPROVED (requires actor)
  dispute               — ANY → DISPUTED (requires dispute_reason)
  resolve_dispute       — DISPUTED → CORROBORATED
  operationalize        — APPROVED → maturity 5 (status stays APPROVED)

ValidationEventResponse.title: ValidationEventResponse
ValidationEventResponse.description: Schema for a ValidationEvent in API responses.
